# @021.is/spine-webhooks — LLM usage

> Inbound webhook HMAC verifier for 4 schemes (raw, github, stripe, resend) with timing-safe compare + tolerance window, plus idempotency-key dedupe.

Install: bun add @021.is/spine-webhooks

## Imports
- `import { makeHmacVerifier, makeMemoryIdempotencyStore } from "@021.is/spine-webhooks"` — single entry

## API
- `makeHmacVerifier(config)` — returns a `Verifier`:
  - `verify(input)` — throws `UnauthorizedException` (bad sig / stale ts) or `BadRequestException` (malformed) ; returns void on success
  - `computeSignature(payload, scheme, nowSec?)` — produce a signature header value
- `VerifierConfig` — `{ secret; toleranceSec?` (default 300)` }`
- `VerifyInput` — `{ payload: string | Buffer; signature: string; headerScheme: HeaderScheme; nowSec? }`
- `HeaderScheme` — `"raw" | "github" | "stripe" | "resend"`
- `IdempotencyStore` interface — `seen(key, ttlSec?) => Promise<boolean>`; `makeMemoryIdempotencyStore()` — in-memory impl
- Types: `Verifier`, `VerifierConfig`, `VerifyInput`, `IdempotencyStore`

## Example
```ts
import { makeHmacVerifier, makeMemoryIdempotencyStore } from "@021.is/spine-webhooks";

const stripe = makeHmacVerifier({ secret: env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET });
const store = makeMemoryIdempotencyStore();

const rawBody = await req.text(); // RAW body, not parsed
stripe.verify({ payload: rawBody, signature: req.headers.get("stripe-signature")!, headerScheme: "stripe" });

const event = JSON.parse(rawBody);
if (await store.seen(event.id)) return; // duplicate
```

## Notes
- Dep: `@021.is/spine-errors` (`verify` throws Spine exceptions). Server-only (`node:crypto`, timing-safe).
- Always verify the RAW request body. `stripe` enforces the `toleranceSec` freshness window. Wire `IdempotencyStore` to Prisma for production.
